question: Which text is visible on the side shelf of the black kettle grill between 74 and 76 seconds? A. GRILL GRAGON B. GrillGrate C. MASTER GRILL D. The Gourmet
How many legs support the charcoal grill stand shown throughout the video?
What is the color of the rectangular tray positioned on the grill's side shelf? A. Black B. White C. Orange D. Silver
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A black kettle-style charcoal grill stands with a metal cooking grate and attached side shelf. An orange rectangular plastic tray rests on the shelf holding a white disposable plate. Raw pink ground beef patties sit on the plate alongside golden-brown hamburger buns. Glowing charcoal briquettes sit beneath the metal grate. A silver ash catcher hangs underneath the main body of the grill.

question: How many raw hamburger patties are visible on the white plate?

Did the video show BOTH three raw hamburger patties on the plate at the beginning AND aluminum foil on the grill grate at the end? A. Only three raw hamburger patties at the beginning B. Only aluminum foil on the grill grate at the end C. Both three raw hamburger patties at the beginning and aluminum foil at the end D. Neither
In the two-zone cooking configuration, where are the glowing charcoal briquettes positioned on the grill?
What action is the person performing with the hamburger patties in this clip? A. arranging buns B. lighting charcoal C. grilling patties D. plating patties
Describe the visual progression of the grill setup and food arrangement throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a black kettle grill sits next to an orange tray holding raw patties and buns; at 4s, aluminum foil is visible covering the left side of the grate while coals glow on the right; at 14s, the white plate now holds only two seasoned patties instead of three; at 18s, glowing charcoal briquettes are visible beneath the metal grate.
